caption: I was so excited to take my girls to @ultabeauty and show them my fragrance in the store! ✨🤍🥹 they were so proud! My heart is so happy 🤍
I love my girls!!!! XO Khloé 💋
XO Khloé is in @ultabeauty and I couldn’t be more excited!!!!!
XO Khloé is now available in all @ultabeauty stores nationwide! Just in time for the holidays! 🎁💋

XO Khloé is officially available in all @ultabeauty stores nationwide TODAY! Thank you to everyone for all of the love on my signature scent. This feels like a dream and I’m so excited to finally share my fragrance with you. 🤍✨😍
✨ the glam fairies were in full effect ✨
A time was had!!!! I still feel like I am dreaming!!! What a magical time in London! XO Khloé ✨✨
Guess what?! XO Khloé is available exclusively in Europe at @harrodsbeauty @harrods 🤍 Thank you all so much for the love on my signature fragrance! 🇬🇧✨
💦🥛 when @ellenvonunwerth says to spit milk - you spit milk

As she enters her 40s, @khloekardashian is reclaiming her confidence and tackling work with renewed purpose: “I got really insecure about doing anything on my own,” she says. “There were so many negative thoughts in my head. I’ve always been such a confident person, and then I went through some personal things with my relationships and a lot of them took a hit at my self-esteem.” Now, having shed the baggage of her 30s, she’s finally ready to quiet her inner critic and reclaim what’s been hers all along. 

Read Bustle’s December cover story with Khloé Kardashian at the link in bio.
